nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Welcome to today’s episode of Match Made in Heaven! Today we present you four different contestants out of this world!

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: The first one Decln’Argegh comes from a distant planet where flying cars are relicts of the past 'cause you can just fly instead!

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: The second one, CyberJohn used to be the assistant to the CEO of the logistics corporation KOSMEX, who recently died. His goal is to start the best logistics company in the galaxy, and he needs a new SLP - strategic life partner to make it happen.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Next is Juhei Ikeet. The brave knight of planet Vexalia is as lethal as they are pretty. They chase after love and enemies of Vaelia clan.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: She’s like the moon on a dark night… Shining bright on the dancefloor, being admired from afar. Welcome Arneth Maalg!

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Today, all four of them will fight for the heart of the Human, from Earth!

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Let’s begin with something simple. Do you have any unusual hobbies our guest should know about?

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Start with you, Decln'Argegh.

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: Well, in my free time I like to shoot stuff and… Water my plants.

choices.text: Watering plants? I love watering plants!
choices.follow_up: Finally a human who appreciates the delicate nature of plants! Plants! More like weeds! SHOOT YOUR SHOT, IDIOT!

choices.text: Okay, seems like a boring way to spend your free time.
choices.follow_up: BORING?! At least I’m doing something interesting. Not like you. Humans only sit on their asses and… Yes, it is boring. But it relaxes me…

choices.text: I don’t know… Shooting stuff seems like a red flag to me.
choices.follow_up: Shooting stuff is how we are raised. From the moment I received my first weapon when I was mere three days old, I never let it go… I have it on me now! WANNA SEE?

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Haha! Fantastic! What about you, Juhei?

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: I don’t do hobbies. But when I am not on duty, I like to master my dagger throwing.

choices.text: Seems like you’re a busy girl.
choices.follow_up: Not a girl. On my planet, we don’t believe in such archaic ideas like gender.

choices.text: I respect people who put their job first in their life.
choices.follow_up: Oh, you do? Not many people outside my planet think like that.

choices.text: I also like sports, but I prefer jogging.
choices.follow_up: A jogging? Is that a human word for “mating”?

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Wonderful! Arneth now is your turn.

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: I like going to the clubs on various planets. Music on mine doesn’t work well with my ethereal hearing. I’ve heard some earthian songs. They’re pretty good. It depends on a party, though.

choices.text: I have some tracks on my phone you might like. Should I bluetooth them for you?
choices.follow_up: Don’t know what bluetooth is but sure, whatever. I know what’s really on your mind, blue eyes.

choices.text: Oh so that’s why your ears are so humungous!
choices.follow_up: My ears are magnificent. Advanced for hearing sounds not hearable for creatures underdeveloped like you.

choices.text: A party girl? Been there, done that. Don’t wanna go back.
choices.follow_up: Bet I could change your mind. But that would be wasting my time.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: CyberJohn! Tell us about your interests. Surely it looks different from all of us mere aliens!

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: I have goals. My hobby is monetizing every minute of my existence.

choices.text: Huh, you never leave your work?
choices.follow_up: Error. What’s the point of existing, if you don’t accumulate your capital!

choices.text: It’s satisfying when your hobby is meaningful.
choices.follow_up: Potential Strategic Life Partner detected.

choices.text: Yhm, are you trying to be a sugar daddy or something?
choices.follow_up: Disagreed. I’m only interested in finding a new Strategic Life Partner.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: What have your past relationships taught you? I would say - don’t get married! *laughs*

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: Never take your date for a swim. I learnt my lesson a few eons back. She didn’t have fins and well… Need I say more? WE WERE FINALLY FREE…

choices.text: No, it’s completely understandable. I experienced that too…
choices.follow_up: Someone who understands me… I always hoped for a being that… SWIMS! Or doesn’t shed its skin out of the sudden…

choices.text: Yes! You do
choices.follow_up: OKAY! Maybe beings underdeveloped like you don’t have that knowledge. But no fins mean no breathing. And no breathing means… Well, losing your skin basically. Don’t worry though - she regained her strength. And broke up with me...

choices.text: She died?!
choices.follow_up: NO! Well… Maybe for a moment. But then she resurrected. Kind of. Shed her skin and we went our separate ways. She broke up with us!

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: To never let anyone get too close to me again! The last person I mated with was fine at first. Then, when we were alone, they told me they were sent here to spy on my people! So, I have to stab that enemy with my dagger.

choices.text: That’s horrible!
choices.follow_up: I know! Anyone can be an enemy these days.

choices.text: I could change your ways of thinking.
choices.follow_up: No, you can't. My planet is my duty, there is no place for any enemy of ours.

choices.text: Maybe you were overreacting?
choices.follow_up: I am not! My planet is my duty, there is no place for any enemy of ours.

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: I don’t do relationships. I party and I dance. It’s that simple yet so complex. It’s the way of the swarm. These are our songs. You can’t hold me down for long. But you can always try.

choices.text: I hold down, pretty girl- pretty good! I-I am willing to… try. Yeah… *blushes*
choices.follow_up: Are you sure? I see you blushing, babes.

choices.text: Yeah, don’t bother, girl. My boat doesn’t float that way, sorry.
choices.follow_up: Not everyone is ready to ship my dock. Your loss.

choices.text: Oh no, I don’t do one-night stands. Two-night stands and up will do.
choices.follow_up: You’d have to prove your flexibility. I don’t know if you’ll last even one.

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: Most partnerships fail because the parties don’t think about achieving milestones.

choices.text: Yes, I totally agree that it’s important to discuss your values.
choices.follow_up: I don’t have space for discussion. I know the best solution.

choices.text: You had an interesting social life.
choices.follow_up: Yes, that’s a fact.

choices.text: I don’t think you can make a roadmap for a relationship…
choices.follow_up: Failing to plan is planning to failure.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: If you had a superpower, would you use it for good… or for fun? My ex-wife surely used it for fun!

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: FUN! I mean… For good for sure… Yes, I would probably bring some ancient civilization from eons ago to life or something like that. Rising like the phoenix from the ashes. BURN AND PERSEVERE!

choices.text: Oh cool! Like dinosaurs?
choices.follow_up: What is a dinosaur? I meant some primeval being that rules the whole world. I would have to think about it but that seems cool! ALL HAIL THE KHAL’GUL!

choices.text: As long as this old civilization doesn’t want to kill the human race…
choices.follow_up: Don’t need any help with that. You’re doing it by yourself. Look at your planet already dying because you don’t care! LIKE YOU DIDN’T KILL ANY OF YOUR PLANTS! HYPOCRITE!

choices.text: That’s stupid. If they die they die. There’s no coming back!
choices.follow_up: We came back. You’re looking at a remnant of history. History that outdates even your beloved Earth. My race died and was reborn from the ashes before yours was even created.

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: If I was blessed with a superpower, I would use it to protect people on my planet. Duty makes knight. I would become the great protector of my planet, and I would slay every enemy on my path.

choices.text: Your ambition is so hot.
choices.follow_up: …Thank you.

choices.text: That thing again? Aren’t you getting bored by talking about it over and over again?
choices.follow_up: Maybe this is a thing that your little human brain can’t handle, but it is the most important for my people!

choices.text: What do you mean by that?
choices.follow_up: I would like to be harder, better, faster, strong. The great knight.

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: *Laughs* Fun for sure. What’s life without a little fun? That’s why I party. I can still make you feel good though. Well I guess I could also make people dance more. The simple act of dance can change the world. The clubs would finally be filled with bliss.

choices.text: I like fun! And I do like to dance.
choices.follow_up: Oh really? We have to test it out then. I like your confidence.

choices.text: I’m more of a couch potato. I go to sleep before nine… So you know. Not a party person.
choices.follow_up: I can’t stand staying in one place. But you do you, boring human.

choices.text: You treat dancing as a good deed? How about solving world hunger? Stopping wars?
choices.follow_up: You brought those things on yourself. I pity your fragile race.

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: For me, it would be fun to create a supply chain that never ever underperforms.

choices.text: I see, you really like your work.
choices.follow_up: Yes, I’m dedicated to my work by all means,

choices.text: Cool, you’re so creative!
choices.follow_up: Potential Strategic Life Partner detected.

choices.text: That sounds kinda… boring
choices.follow_up: Disagreed. Candidate doesn’t value business ethics.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: What kind of future are you building for yourself?

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: Worlds engulfed in fire so they could burn and be remade again from scratch. And me as the creator and master of those worlds! Spreading my wings above the whole universe! A new life! Just kidding, of course! *laughs* I want to have a big greenhouse with all kinds of different plants.

choices.text: I have some magnificent species in my homeland… Homespace to be precise. I think? Anyway I could share these with you if you’d like. I also have a green thumb like you!
choices.follow_up: Um… That’s a generous offer, human being. My thumb isn’t green though… I have green wings, does that count? I CAN BE YOUR MASTER.

choices.text: Um… I’m not sure if you’re joking around but if you are - it’s not funny. Like at all.
choices.follow_up: My joke was only partial. I would like to BURN the world.

choices.text: You remind me of my ex. He also liked to set things on fire… And then immediately quench it.
choices.follow_up: Can he come here? I would like to meet this ex. FUN FUN!

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: I want to build a legacy, that will last after me. To make people of my planet proud. This is why it is vital for me to find a mate with whom I could breed ideal little babies.

choices.text: What is wrong with you?!
choices.follow_up: I don’t know what you mean. What is more important than making babies?

choices.text: That’s… uhm… something.
choices.follow_up: See? I knew you are smart, human.

choices.text: I could offer my services in that aspect. I am an expert.
choices.follow_up: Oh… you would? I would really enjoy that.

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: Future with lots of bliss on the world. I’d like to dance and sing to music. I have a vision where the whole world will move in the same rhythm. In a state of absolute bliss. I dream of it constantly.

choices.text: Neverending party? Sign me up!
choices.follow_up: You’re welcome to join us. The swarm is open to those that open their hearts to music.

choices.text: No thanks, I’m more of a homebody.
choices.follow_up: You’re hedonistic in a way. But too stale for our swarm.

choices.text: Don’t get me wrong - I like music but full bliss? Like drugs? We say no to drugs.
choices.follow_up: This is better than drugs. It's a community.

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: I am building a future that brings efficiency to my company. I want profit.

choices.text: Mmm, I admire your ambition.
choices.follow_up: Ambition is the fuel in our warp drives.

choices.text: You sound like another wannabe self-made billionaire.
choices.follow_up: Correct.

choices.text: I guess, that’s a plan, for sure. Not necessarily my cup of tea.
choices.follow_up: Not every lifeform is ready to be part of my most complex supply chain in the quadrant.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: What’s your perfect cozy night like — and is there room for two? Or for three? My ex sure liked a good crowd. Oh the good ol’ days!

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: I usually fly around the planet to see some stars. I like to watch the constellations far away. Makes me think about the passage of time. I’m pretty young but time’s gonna come for all of us. I guess… I would like someone to observe the night sky with me. A companion, you could say.

choices.text: How old are you actually? Cause you don’t look past thirty…ish?
choices.follow_up: Only two thousand eons young… Well I’m almost reaching three thousand so you weren’t far off. Time is a cruel master.

choices.text: In my home I used to watch stars through my telescope during the starry night… Used to cause the sky got so polluted it became impossible to see them… I miss it very much...
choices.follow_up: I have room for one more. You are welcome to join me anytime. JOIN!

choices.text: Planet like in space? I can’t fly! And breathe there... So that’s a pass for me.
choices.follow_up: Can’t do much about that. Seems like a you problem. IDIOT!

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: Cozy night? Most of my nights I spent on my knight duties. But some days my tent is so cold. I could enjoy a company of some other person, to make heat.

choices.text: We could make heat, together.
choices.follow_up: It would be great.

choices.text: Makes sense.
choices.follow_up: I know.

choices.text: Then make fire?
choices.follow_up: With what? A dagger?

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: Cozy is not a part of my vocabulary. I move. I glide. I devour. And I’m never alone. Even in our dream. It’s a constant trance.

choices.text: Yeah, I also hate the word cozy. Switch it up with cramped, am I right?
choices.follow_up: You get it. You’re perfect for our swarm.

choices.text: I don’t get it. You eat on parties with your friends? That’s like… Not really extraordinary.
choices.follow_up: You would be surprised. Or worse.

choices.text: I recommend ordering pizza if you like devouring food… or something.
choices.follow_up: I don’t know what pizza is. My kind doesn’t consume in that sense. It devours.

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: I like to relax with spreadsheets in the company of data.

choices.text: I'm an Excel gamer too!
choices.follow_up: Maybe you’re a valid candidate for my Strategic Life Partner

choices.text: I hate fucking Excel.
But Excel is an office tool…
choices.follow_up: Excel is a greatest achievement of your primitive civilization.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Be honest… have you ever broken someone’s heart?

nodes.speaker: Decln'Argegh
nodes.text_original: Well it happened twice or thrice… Wait - did you mean metaphorically? Then no. Never. I’m not that bad. THE BADDEST! Either way - I don’t have time for playing with fire. At least not now. I desire something different.

choices.text: What the hell? That’s awful!
choices.follow_up: It wasn’t that bad actually… She had a spare one. And that was rotten anyway. Did her a favour, really. We could just fly our own ways. Her desire was different from mine.

choices.text: I had my heart broken numerous times. It’s great to hear there is someone with great values like you.
choices.follow_up: I would never break your heart like that. Especially because you only have one. Wouldn’t want to risk losing you. Now my desire has changed.

choices.text: You sound like a real heartbreaker. Like literally. I don’t date bad boys.
choices.follow_up: Your loss. My desire is different either way.

nodes.speaker: Juhei Ikeet
nodes.text_original: I have not. I don’t have time for such trivial things like love games. All I care about is my knight duties and finding a perfect person to mate with.

choices.text: To be honest, I’d be fine with friends with benefits.
choices.follow_up: What is the meaning of this? I don’t know what you mean, human.

choices.text: It seems like a perfect combination for me.
choices.follow_up: Then you could be a perfect mate for me.

choices.text: I don’t think I look for this kind of commitment.
choices.follow_up: Then I don’t look for you, human.

nodes.speaker: Arneth Maalg
nodes.text_original: Heartbreak is like a poison for your soul. Poison is not a part of the swarm. It’s peaceful. An eternal bliss. That’s our vision for the future. The dream we crave. I don’t wish to offer it to just anyone. I expect the same thing in exchange.

choices.text: I’ve had my heart broken into pieces. It would be nice to have it patched up by someone who really cares.
choices.follow_up: In the swarm your heart would be safe. You would be whole. Soul and body merge in one. In one you’d find pure happiness.

choices.text: Yeah, no… I’m a heartbreaker. And I’m not ready to settle down yet.
choices.follow_up: Harm is not allowed in the swarm. We love and please each other.

choices.text: After some thought… Your offer sounds tempting but I’m not convinced about that whole swarm thing so… Pass.
choices.follow_up: Maybe I could persuade you. Let me in.

nodes.speaker: CyberJohn
nodes.text_original: There’s no doubt that my effectiveness has broken the hearts of many competitors. It's the risk I am ready to take.

choices.text: What a beast, I hope you won’t break mine…
choices.follow_up: I will take advantage of every opportunity for fruitful cooperation.

choices.text: Do you even have any feelings?
choices.follow_up: Entrepreneurs don't care about feelings; they care about efficiency.

choices.text: Yyyyh, Why would your business competitors be interested in you?
choices.follow_up: They’re obsessed with me…

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Alright, that’s all questions for now. It’s time to neiusnfkjdngsjodng!

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: You don’t have that word in your vocabulary, do you?

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: That’s a pity.

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Humans are fragile creatures, not able to comprehend the full essence of space and time…

nodes.speaker: Presenter
nodes.text_original: Anyway! Now’s the time to choose! Who will you pick as your companion for life?
